creator: brian.r.haug@gmail.com
text:
on the page http://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/firewalls-ipf.html in section 31.5.16 there is a link to ipnat(5); however the link has a typo and refers to http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=ipnat&sektion=5 instead of http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=ipnat&sektion=5 (sekiton instead of sektion and extra "amp;")

Fix: 

change url from:
   http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=ipnat&sektion=5
to
   http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=ipnat&sektion=5
How-To-Repeat: view http://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/firewalls-ipf.html, scroll down to section 31.5.16 and click on the link to ipnat() about three lines down.
